meta.transformationNotes: Revenue sourced from CT Tax Revenue by Month (Socrata dataset aagd-92m2), with each tax type as a separate column. Amounts in whole dollars. Expenditure sourced from CT Open Expenditures - Ledger Current (dataset ajdm-rvz7), aggregated by department for the reporting month. Revenue columns with zero or negative values are excluded. Intra-governmental transfers excluded from expenditure.
